name: vkb
description: Vector Knowledge Base — self-contained, local-first semantic memory system
long_description: vkb is a graph-augmented vector knowledge base that runs entirely on your own machine. It ingests documents and URLs, chunks and embeds them via Ollama, stores vectors in Postgres+pgvector, and builds a typed knowledge graph (sequential, semantic, heuristic, and LLM-extracted relations). Exposed as an MCP server so any MCP-capable host (Claude Desktop, Claude CLI, etc.) can ingest documents, query semantically, traverse the knowledge graph, and inspect raw text — without sending your data to external services.

tools.name: vkb_ingest
tools.description: Submit raw text or a URL/file path for ingestion. Returns job_id and entity_id immediately; pipeline runs in background.

tools.name: vkb_reingest
tools.description: Re-run the ingest pipeline from rawstore for one or all entities (re-chunks, re-embeds, re-summarises).

tools.name: vkb_job
tools.description: Poll a job by ID. Returns current pipeline stage, progress counters, and error detail if failed.

tools.name: vkb_query
tools.description: Semantic vector search. Returns top-k chunks with summaries, entity context, similarity scores, section summaries, and relations.

tools.name: vkb_get
tools.description: Fetch a full entity or chunk by UUID, including summaries, chunk list, sections, and all relations.

tools.name: vkb_raw
tools.description: Fetch the raw original text for an entity or chunk from the filesystem rawstore.

tools.name: vkb_relate
tools.description: Assert an explicit typed relation between any two entity or chunk IDs. Asserted relations are never pruned.

tools.name: vkb_delete
tools.description: Delete an entity and cascade-remove all associated chunks, sections, relations, and rawstore files.

tools.name: vkb_retune
tools.description: Trigger a retune sweep: rebuilds entity summaries, relation graph, and vector index. Returns a job_id for polling.

tools.name: vkb_status
tools.description: Full system snapshot: entity/chunk/relation counts, job queue depth, worker state, active config, and vector index status.

database_url.title: Database URL
database_url.description: PostgreSQL connection string for the vkb database (requires pgvector extension).

ollama_base_url.title: Ollama Base URL
ollama_base_url.description: Base URL of your local Ollama instance.

embed_model.title: Embedding Model
embed_model.description: Ollama model used to generate embeddings (e.g. nomic-embed-text, mxbai-embed-large).

embed_dim.title: Embedding Dimension
embed_dim.description: Vector dimension output by the embedding model. Must match the chosen embed_model (e.g. 768 for nomic-embed-text, 1024 for mxbai-embed-large).

llm_model.title: LLM Model
llm_model.description: Ollama model used for chunk/section summarisation and relation extraction (e.g. gemma4:e4b, mistral).

rawstore_adapter.title: Rawstore Adapter
rawstore_adapter.description: Storage backend for raw documents: 'filesystem' (default) or 's3'.

rawstore_path.title: Rawstore Path
rawstore_path.description: Local directory where raw ingested documents are persisted (filesystem adapter only).

chunk_size.title: Chunk Size
chunk_size.description: Target token count per chunk when splitting documents.

chunk_overlap.title: Chunk Overlap
chunk_overlap.description: Number of tokens of overlap between adjacent chunks.

section_strategy.title: Section Strategy
section_strategy.description: Algorithm used to group chunks into sections: 'similarity_valley' (default) or 'positional'.

section_split_threshold.title: Section Split Threshold
section_split_threshold.description: Cosine-similarity valley threshold below which a new section boundary is created (similarity_valley strategy).

section_window_size.title: Section Window Size
section_window_size.description: Number of neighbouring chunks examined when detecting section boundaries.

section_max_size.title: Section Max Size
section_max_size.description: Maximum number of chunks allowed in a single section before a forced split.

relation_threshold.title: Relation Threshold
relation_threshold.description: Minimum cosine similarity required to create a semantic relation between chunks.

relation_top_k.title: Relation Top-K
relation_top_k.description: Number of nearest neighbours considered when building the similarity relation graph.

relation_confidence_step.title: Relation Confidence Step
relation_confidence_step.description: Increment applied to relation confidence scores during retune reinforcement.

relation_ttl_days.title: Relation TTL (days)
relation_ttl_days.description: Number of days before un-reinforced heuristic/semantic relations are eligible for pruning.

relation_prune_threshold.title: Relation Prune Threshold
relation_prune_threshold.description: Relations with confidence below this value are removed during a retune sweep.

llm_relation_extraction.title: LLM Relation Extraction
llm_relation_extraction.description: Set to 'false' to disable LLM-based relation extraction and use heuristic relations only.

llm_extract_candidates.title: LLM Extract Candidates
llm_extract_candidates.description: Number of top candidate chunk pairs presented to the LLM for relation extraction per entity.

ivfflat_threshold.title: IVFFlat Threshold
ivfflat_threshold.description: Minimum number of vectors required before switching the pgvector index from flat to IVFFlat.

ivfflat_lists.title: IVFFlat Lists
ivfflat_lists.description: Number of IVFFlat index lists (clusters). Higher values improve query speed at large scale.

worker_concurrency.title: Worker Concurrency
worker_concurrency.description: Maximum number of ingest/retune jobs processed in parallel.

ingest_max_retries.title: Ingest Max Retries
ingest_max_retries.description: Number of times a failed ingest job is retried before being marked as permanently failed.

retune_interval_hours.title: Retune Interval (hours)
retune_interval_hours.description: How often the automatic background retune sweep runs. Set to 0 to disable.

retune_summarise.title: Retune Summarise
retune_summarise.description: Set to 'true' to re-generate entity/section summaries during each retune sweep.

job_ttl_days.title: Job TTL (days)
job_ttl_days.description: Number of days completed/failed job records are retained before being cleaned up.

summary_concurrency.title: Summary Concurrency
summary_concurrency.description: Maximum parallel LLM calls during chunk summarisation. Higher is faster but increases Ollama load.

summary_max_input_chars.title: Summary Max Input Characters
summary_max_input_chars.description: Maximum characters fed into the entity-level summary prompt, to avoid context-window overflow on large documents.

summary_prompt_file.title: Entity Summary Prompt File
summary_prompt_file.description: Path to a custom Handlebars prompt template for entity-level summarisation. Leave blank to use the built-in prompt.

chunk_summary_prompt_file.title: Chunk Summary Prompt File
chunk_summary_prompt_file.description: Path to a custom Handlebars prompt template for chunk-level summarisation.

section_summary_prompt_file.title: Section Summary Prompt File
section_summary_prompt_file.description: Path to a custom Handlebars prompt template for section-level summarisation.

relation_extract_prompt_file.title: Relation Extraction Prompt File
relation_extract_prompt_file.description: Path to a custom Handlebars prompt template for LLM relation extraction.

obs_port.title: Observability Port
obs_port.description: Port for the HTTP observability/metrics server. Set to 0 to disable.

mcp_secret.title: MCP Secret
mcp_secret.description: Shared secret for authenticating MCP HTTP requests. Leave blank to disable authentication.

obs_secret.title: Observability Secret
obs_secret.description: Shared secret for authenticating observability server requests. Leave blank to disable authentication.

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Minimum log level written to stderr and forwarded to the MCP client (debug, info, warn, error).
